title: Unidentified Items
description: Items can be Unidentified in loot tables!
body: Turn ordinary loot into mysterious **Unidentified Items**—then reveal their true form with **Identify Scrolls**. ## What it does - **Unidentified loot:** Items from loot tables can drop in an *unidentified* state. - **Identify Scrolls:** Use a scroll on an unidentified item (drag & drop in inventory) to restore its original tier and name. - **Fully configurable:** Choose exactly which items (or tags) can roll as unidentified, and set the chance. ## Configuration Edit the mod’s JSON config to: - enable/disable the feature - set the unidentified chance - list specific item IDs or tags that are eligible ## Getting Identify Scrolls The **Identify Scroll** does **not** ship with a recipe or loot table yet—add your own recipe/loot table/datapack to distribute it in your pack. ## Compatibility - Works with Tiered / Tiered More
